name: im2cc
description: 通过飞书或微信远程操控本地 AI coding tools，电脑与手机无缝流转

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "try{const p=require('fs').readFileSync(require('os').homedir()+'/.im2cc/daemon.pid','utf-8').trim();process.kill(Number(p),0);console.log('\x1b[33m⚠️  daemon (PID '+p+') 正在运行旧代码，请运行 im2cc stop \x26\x26 im2cc start 重启\x1b[0m')}catch{}"
